<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Regorafenib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Stivarga is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients with:  metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC) who have been previously treated with, or are not considered candidates for,...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>liposarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>clear cell renal carcinoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma associated with Xp11.2 translocations/TFE3 gene fusions（99.2%）</li>
<li>unclassified renal cell carcinoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma associated with neuroblastoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>childhood kidney cell carcinoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>vulva sarcoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>spindle cell liposarcoma（98.8%）</li>
<li>adenocarcinoma of liver and intrahepatic biliary tract（98.8%）</li>
<li>undifferentiated carcinoma of liver and intrahepatic biliary tract（98.7%）</li>
<li>renal cell carcinoma (disease)（98.7%）</li>
<li>renal carcinoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>angiolipoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（98.5%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct adenocarcinoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（98.4%）</li>
<li>breast fibroadenoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（98.4%）</li>
<li>pleomorphic adenoma（98.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
